chapter_title.ar: باب مِقْدَارِ الْمَاءِ الَّذِي يُجْزِئُ لِلْوُضُوءِ وَ الْغُسْلِ وَ مَنْ تَعَدَّى فِي الْوُضُوءِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 14 – Measurement of the water which suffices for the Ablution (Wudhu) and the washing, the one who exceeds in the Ablution (Wudhu)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/68)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/68)
text: يُجْزِئُكَ مِنَ الْغُسْلِ وَ الِاسْتِنْجَاءِ مَا مُلِئَتْ يَمِينُكَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Yazeed Bin Is’haq, from Haroun Bin Hamza,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘It would suffice you from the washing and the cleansing (after toilet) what fills your right hand’.
en.sarwar: 6. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn from Yazid ibn Ishaq from Harun ibn Hamzah who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘An amount of water which can fill up your right hand is sufficient for your Ghusl (bath) and washing clean your urethra.’”
